/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -o text_to_geometry_bindings.cpython-313-darwin.so CMakeFiles/text_to_geometry_bindings.dir/bindings/pybind_compile.cpp.o  libfrontend.a libkernel.a
